titleStmt.title: SII 17.316: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 316. (A.R. No. 287 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.
This is an incomplete inscription of Parakēsarivarman Uḍaiyār Śrī Rājēndra Chōḷadēva I stopping after citing his praśāsti commencing with Tirumaṉṉivaḷara, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭa
ntaiyum poṟ ceyyappā
vaiyum cirttaṉi celviyun=tan perunteviya
rāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyilūḻiyil
liṭaiyituṟaiynāṭun tuṭar
vaṉa velip paṭaṟ vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷi
cūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇ
ṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porukaṭali
ḻattaraiyartam muṭiyu māṅkavarteviya
roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal te
ṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntara muṭiyum In
tira nāramun teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭa
lamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭai kera
ḷan muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya pa
lar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālai caṅkatir ve
lait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan
tivuñ ceruviṟ ciṉavil Irupattoru kāla
raicu kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cā
n=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempon ti
rutta(k)kumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muya
ṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅ
ka naḷapperumpukaḻoṭu piṭiyil liraṭṭapāṭi
Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkulapperuma
laikaḷum vikkirama virar cakkara koṭṭamum mutarpa
ṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷai nara
maṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilai virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaip paḻanamācuṇi tecamu mayarvilvaṇ
kirtti yātinakaravaiyil cantiraṉṟolkulattintirataṉai viḷaiyamaṟkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭu piṭiyttu palataṉattoṭu niṟai kulataṉakkuvaiyuṅ ki
ṭṭaruñ ceṟimuḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurar ceyanaṟk kocalaināṭun taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colaittaṇ
ṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākki tikkiṇaikirtti takkaṇa lāṭamum kovintacantaṉ māviḻintoṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamu
n toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkuoṭṭal mahipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟalyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭalu
ttaralāṭamum veṟimalarttirtta teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭpalakalañceluttic caṅkiṟāma vicaiyottuṅkapanmarākiya kiṭāratta
rayyaṉai vākaiyamporukaṭaṟk kumpakkaṟiyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya peruneti piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉakanakar porttoḻil vācalil viccātiratoraṇa
mum moyttoḷiṟ puṉamaṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟaicirvicaiyamum tuṟainīrpanṉai yum vaṉamalai Ūrayiṟṟoṉmalai Ūrum Āḻ
kaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācokamum kāpporuniṟai puṉal māpap pāḷamum kāvalaṉpuricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟiṭai
vaḷaippantūṟum kalaittakkorpukaḻ talaittakkolamum tirumāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmuṟikaṭuntiṟal Ilāmuṟitecamum teṉak
kalarppoḻir māṉakkavāramun toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumuṟaṭ kaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḻatevaṟ
Digital edition of SII 17.316 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
